JHIN-BULLET_POWER.title: Bullets
JHIN-MARK_POWER.title: Mark
JHIN-MARK_POWER.description: The next time Jhin hits this enemy with a [gold]Shoot[/gold] card, it takes {markDamagePerStack} additional damage per stack, then loses all [gold]Mark[/gold].
JHIN-LOTUS_TRAP_POWER.title: Lotus Trap
JHIN-LOTUS_TRAP_POWER.description: After this enemy attacks, remove [gold]Lotus Trap[/gold]. Deal {lotusTrapDamagePerStack} damage and apply {lotusTrapWeakPerStack} [gold]Weak[/gold] per stack. If this damage kills the enemy, deal {lotusTrapDeathExplosionDamage} damage to all enemies per stack.
JHIN-FLOURISH_TEMPO_POWER.title: Flourish Tempo
JHIN-FLOURISH_TEMPO_POWER_PLUS.title: Flourish Tempo
JHIN-FLOURISH_TEMPO_POWER_PLUS.descripti: Whenever you trigger [gold]Flourish[/gold], gain 1 Energy and draw 1 card.
JHIN-FORCED_FLOURISH_POWER.title: Flourish Potion
JHIN-FORCED_FLOURISH_POWER.description: This turn, your next [gold]Shoot[/gold] card triggers [gold]Flourish[/gold].
JHIN-COMPOSED_POWER.title: Composed
JHIN-COMPOSED_POWER.description: The first [gold]Flourish[/gold] each combat: draw 2 cards.
JHIN-MUZZLE_RHYTHM_POWER.title: Muzzle Rhythm
JHIN-MUZZLE_RHYTHM_POWER.description: Every 4th Attack card played: gain 1 Strength.
JHIN-MUZZLE_RHYTHM_POWER_PLUS.title: Muzzle Rhythm
JHIN-MUZZLE_RHYTHM_POWER_PLUS.descriptio: Every 4th Attack card played: gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity.
JHIN-AUDIENCE_SEATED_POWER.title: Audience Seated
JHIN-SHOW_PLAN_POWER.title: Show Plan
JHIN-BLOODY_STAGE_P.title: Bloody Stage
JHIN-BLOODY_STAGE_P.description: When an enemy first drops below 50% HP, apply {markAmount} [gold]Mark[/gold].
JHIN-INTERMISSION_POWER.title: Intermission
JHIN-INTERMISSION_POWER.description: The first non-Shoot Attack each turn deals {bonusDamage} additional damage.
JHIN-GUN_MAINTENANCE_POWER.title: Gun Maintenance
JHIN-GUN_MAINTENANCE_POWER_PLUS.title: Gun Maintenance
JHIN-GUN_MAINTENANCE_POWER_PLUS.descript: Whenever you reload, draw 1 card and gain 2 Block.
JHIN-ACTORS_INSTINCT_POWER.title: Actor's Instinct
JHIN-ACTORS_INSTINCT_POWER.description: If you didn't [gold]Flourish[/gold] this turn, gain 1 Strength next turn.
JHIN-ACTORS_INSTINCT_POWER_PLUS.title: Actor's Instinct
JHIN-ACTORS_INSTINCT_POWER_PLUS.descript: If you didn't [gold]Flourish[/gold] this turn, gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity next turn.
JHIN-STAGE_CONTROL_POWER.title: Stage Control
JHIN-AWAIT_APPLAUSE_POWER.title: Await Applause
